column6: selection_reason

Platform-specific concurrency integration layer, depends on OS

Shared-session coordination using Arc + locks + atomics across connection handlers. Not selected because per connection concurrency is already represented in server.rs and client.rs, so would be redundant

Coordinates screen capture and streaming, concurrent access to shared display resources. Not selected because streaming pipeline pattern already captured in io_loop.rs, this file would only refine the frame level implementation details

Global configuration state

Background worker coordination for periodic automatic synchronisation. Uses atomics for lightweight lifecycle signalling and Arc for shared access across async/background execution contexts.

execution/evaluation component of Nushell. Represents the repository’s dominant shared-ownership style, overlaps with other files so not needes
